backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the AyurGlow blog backend, defining BlogPost and UserProfile types and exposing CRUD operations for posts and user profiles with admin/user access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two fixed features—CreateBlogPostPage form submission and publish/unpublish state management—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's role, used as a reference document for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind directives and OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all page and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and applies the Layout component globally.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a shield icon and a home navigation button when a user lacks admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Thin wrapper component that renders its children directly, acting as a placeholder admin route guard.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sticky sidebar component for blog pages featuring a search bar with live results, a popular posts list with thumbnails, and a category breakdown derived from the provided posts array.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a comment form and list for a given blog post, using React Query hooks to fetch and submit comments with loading states.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a single featured blog post as a large image card with overlaid title, excerpt, metadata, and a link to the full post.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick links, category links, legal links, social media icons, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation and Footer components in a full-height flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop nav links, a categories dropdown, an admin link, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a blog post summary card with thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, and author/date/read-time metadata.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input with a clear button and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarded via ref.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown list of search results with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) that navigates to the selected result's route on selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, admin access checks, and blog post CRUD operations, each gated on actor availability.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Hook that provides client-side search over a static list of Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering by title, category, and keywords based on a user-supplied query string.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the AyurGlow design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for AyurGlow Secrets displaying the platform's mission, philosophy, and offerings in styled card sections with icons.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that lists all blog posts with options to create, edit, delete, and toggle publish/unpublish state, using mutation hooks and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts in a grid with a sidebar, handling loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post fetched by slug, rendering the article content with resolved blob image URLs, metadata, and a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating a new blog post with a Quill rich-text editor, featured image upload, category/tag fields, and optional immediate publishing.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating fields from fetched post data including resolved content images and existing featured image.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: A page displaying four natural/Ayurvedic remedies for dandruff and scalp care, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency, rendered as styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: A page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies to prevent or reverse premature greying, including curry leaf oil, amla-henna pack, black tea rinse, and bhringraj-brahmi oil, displayed as detail cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: A page listing four natural hair fall treatments (onion juice, fenugreek mask, amla-shikakai pack, curry leaves oil) with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency, shown as cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: A page showcasing four Ayurvedic hair growth remedies including castor oil blend, aloe vera-bhringraj mask, egg-yogurt treatment, and hibiscus-curry leaves pack, each detailed in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: A page featuring five Ayurvedic hair oil and mask treatments (hot oil, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, neem-tulsi oil) with full ingredient and application details.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Static landing page for the Hair Care category, displaying a hero section and a grid of subcategory cards linking to specific hair care topics.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Displays a static page of four Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, each with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and frequency, along with a medical disclaimer banner.

A styled alternative page for diabetes and BP support remedies using Card components and a hero section with a back-navigation link, presenting four remedies with ingredients, preparation, benefits, and usage notes.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Renders a styled page for digestion and gut health remedies using Card components and a hero section, listing four Ayurvedic remedies with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.
Displays a simpler static page of four Ayurvedic digestive health remedies with icons, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, using basic card-style layout without navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (e.g., Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage, styled with a green hero section and card layout.

Presents four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (e.g., turmeric golden milk, tulsi-ginger tea) with icons, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a simple card layout with inline black color styles.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Renders a stress relief and sleep page featuring four Ayurvedic remedies (e.g., Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Chamomile-Lavender Blend) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a simple card grid layout.

A styled alternative stress and sleep solutions page with the same four remedies as StressSleepPage but using the shared Card component, a purple-toned hero section, and a back-link to the health remedies index.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Presents four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Water, Ginger-Green Tea) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency in a minimal card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic subcategory cards (immunity, digestion, weight management, diabetes/BP, stress/sleep) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the AyurGlow Secrets home page, including a hero banner, a 'What We Offer' feature grid, and sections for featured and recent blog posts fetched via the useGetPublishedPosts hook.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Static Privacy Policy page that outlines data collection, usage, and user rights for AyurGlow Secrets, presented in styled cards with a hero header and back-to-home link.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Displays a skin care page for acne and pimples featuring four herbal remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Spot Treatment) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, using a blue-toned hero section and card layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (e.g., Neem-Turmeric Paste, Tea Tree-Aloe Spot Treatment), each showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Renders a page of four natural anti-aging remedies (e.g., Almond-Saffron Youth Serum, Avocado-Honey Collagen Boost Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Presents five DIY Ayurvedic face pack recipes categorized by skin type (e.g., Multani Mitti Deep Cleanse, Besan-Turmeric Brightening), each with ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Shows four Ayurvedic natural glow remedies (e.g., Turmeric-Yogurt Glow Mask, Saffron-Milk Radiance Treatment) with ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Displays a page for treating pigmentation and dark spots with four natural remedies (e.g., Lemon-Honey Brightening Mask, Potato-Cucumber Juice), including a hero section, ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency using Card UI components.
React page displaying four natural Ayurvedic remedies for skin pigmentation reduction, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care landing page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic skin-care subcategory cards (natural glow, acne, pigmentation, anti-aging, DIY face packs) linking to their routes.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Static Terms of Service page for AyurGlow Secrets, featuring a medical disclaimer alert and multiple policy sections (agreement, website use, etc.) rendered in styled cards.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Utility functions for handling ExternalBlob image URLs, including converting blobs to direct URLs, injecting data-blob-index attributes into HTML img tags, and replacing img src values using blob index mappings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the AyurGlow frontend, defining a custom color palette (earth-green, gold, cream, etc.) using OKLCH CSS variables, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), and extended border radius and shadow tokens.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for AyurGlow Secrets, tracking known issues around broken admin blog post save/publish functionality and listing pending backend fix requests for post creation persistence and publish/unpublish state toggling.
